contract_summary: Put wrapper for acpi_ec_query_handler. Decrements the kref reference count; if it reaches zero, the release callback (acpi_ec_query_handler_release) is invoked to free the handler. After calling this function, the caller must not access the handler as it may be freed. This function corresponds to the 'release' side of the reference-count lifecycle; the caller must ensure that a matching get was performed before invoking this put.
